Petition For An Order Confirming The Settlement Agreement Executed On September 30, 2024, Following Mediation
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Russell F. Rowen and Eric McFarland for Richard Wesson, Trustee.
Eric Leroy for Lisa M. Reyff (via Zoom).

The court called for any objections to the instant petition. No objections were raised. There being no objections, the court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
